heading: Grants, contracts, etc., authority
label: 4206 Grants, contracts, etc., authority
text: The Secretary may carry out the purposes of this chapter, with existing facilities and funds otherwise available, through the use of grants, contracts, or such other means as the Secretary deems appropriate.
notes: Effective DateSection effective six months after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 22, 1981section 1549 of Pub. L. 97–98section 4201 of this title
